title: serratula attica
intro: Serratula attica, also known as Attica milk thistle, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb used in traditional medicine, particularly in the Mediterranean region. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to its saponins and flavonoids. Traditional herbal preparations include tea infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which are believed to offer various health benefits, such as liver protection and improved digestion.
